_meta.keyKnowledge: We investigate the main parts inside common digital devices and what they do.

_source.w: We investigate the main parts inside common digital devices and what they do.
y: Understanding hardware components helps us make informed choices about technology.
Knowing what is inside a computer demystifies how technology actually works.
This knowledge is the foundation for understanding computer performance and troubleshooting.
eg: We identify the CPU, RAM, storage, motherboard and power supply inside a computer.
We discuss what each component does — the CPU processes, RAM stores temporarily, storage keeps permanently.
We compare the specifications of different devices and discuss how they affect performance.
We investigate how upgrading a component (like adding RAM) improves performance.
We explore the components inside a smartphone and compare them to a desktop computer.
We create a labelled diagram of a computer's internal components.
